title: Hut 8 shares jump over 30% on news of $9.8 billion AI data center lease
text: HUT Stock Rally on Beacon Point. Hut 8 shares surged over 30% following announcement of $9.8 billion Beacon Point lease deal. Market reaction demonstrates investor enthusiasm for AI data center business model. Deal includes 352 MW of IT capacity with investment-grade tenant. Stock reached new highs following announcement.
